title: 6th Birthday Balloons, 12" Multicoloured Numbers Printed Latex Age Balloons, Digit 6 for Girls Boys 6 Year Old Birthday Decorations, 6th Anniversary Party (Pack of 10)
features: Colourful Balloons: Assortment of 10 vibrant balloons, 12 inches in size, with printed dinosaur numbers.
Quality Material: Made of high-quality latex, suitable for inflating with air or helium.
Festive Atmosphere: Create a merry and celebratory ambience for any birthday party.
Unique Design: Each balloon features a number and stars printed in varying sizes all over.
Random Colours: Colours of balloons in each pack are randomly assorted and cannot be pre-selected.
description: Product description Transform any celebration into a festive occasion with these colourful balloons featuring printed dinosaurs and numbers. Made from high-quality latex, these balloons can be inflated with air or helium, creating a merry and vibrant atmosphere. Each pack contains an assortment of 10 balloons, measuring 12 inches in size, with varying colours and designs. The balloons are adorned with numbers and stars printed in different sizes all over their surface, adding a touch of whimsy and fun. These balloons are an ideal decoration for any birthday party, providing a playful and joyful ambiance. Please note that the colours of the balloons in each pack are randomly assorted and cannot be pre-selected. Safety Warning 3+
